indications.text:
Edarbi is an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB) indicated for the treatment of hypertension to lower
blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events,
primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been seen in controlled tria...

Edarbi is an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB) indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may
be used alone or in combination with other antihypertensive agents.
